transcription.text: This is your project and your time. That's why you went to True Value. To get your tools and supplies from someone who knows exactly what you need. Modern. Refreshed. Uniquely you. You don't need permission. But if you end up needing a little guidance, that's always in stock too. Just a couple benefits of being helped by the owner. True Value. Your project. Your way. True Value. Your way.
